query: LLM literature screening recall precision automation
notes: Good CS coverage. Included: li2024asreview, patel2023gpt4review, chen2024benchmark. Excluded: 7 papers focused on recommendation systems (different task), 2 papers with no empirical evaluation.

notes: Strong biomedical focus. Included: morrison2024cochrane, robinson2023medscreen, ahmed2024pubmed. Excluded: 14 papers on diagnostic test screening (radiology task, not literature review). 3 papers inaccessible (paywalled, no open version found).
